text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri May 10 15:57:07 2013
New Revision: 317824
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317824

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.14
  
  PR:		177912
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/graphics/wxsvg/Makefile
  head/graphics/wxsvg/distinfo

Modified: head/graphics/wxsvg/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/wxsvg/Makefile	Fri May 10 15:56:09 2013	(r317823)
+++ head/graphics/wxsvg/Makefile	Fri May 10 15:57:07 2013	(r317824)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	wxsvg
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.13
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.15
 CATEGORIES=	graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -33,4 +33,9 @@ LIBAV_PC=	libavcodec1 libavformat1 libav
 LIBAV_CFLAGS=	$$(pkg-config --cflags ${LIBAV_PC})
 LIBAV_LIBS=	$$(pkg-config --libs ${LIBAV_PC})
 
+post-extract:
+.for i in configure install-sh
+	@${CHMOD} ${BINMODE} ${WRKSRC}/${i}
+.endfor
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
